title: Pan-Seared Norwegian Cod with Japanese Stew
description: A Japanese-inspired dish featuring pan-seared Norwegian cod served with a flavorful stew made with cod, stew vegetables, and a hint of Asian spices.

ingredients.name: Stew Vegetables
ingredients.notes: You can use any combination of vegetables you like

ingredients.name: Sizzling Asian Sauce
ingredients.amount: 1/4 cup soy sauce, 1/4 cup sake, 2 tbsp rice vinegar

ingredients.name: Shattering Ginger
ingredients.amount: 2 inches fresh ginger, peeled and grated

instructions: 1. Heat sesame oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
2. Add the grated ginger and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
3. Add the Norwegian cod fillets and cook for 3-4 minutes per side, until cooked through.
4. Remove the cod from the skillet and set aside.
5. In the same skillet, add the stew vegetables and cook until they are tender.
6. Add the cod fish stock, soy sauce, sake, and rice vinegar to the skillet and stir to combine.
7. Bring the mixture to a simmer and cook for 2-3 minutes, until the sauce has thickened.
8. Serve the pan-seared Norwegian cod with the Japanese stew spooned over the top.
